title: NekoC
description: Become the Neko you always wanted to be!
body:
OVERVIEW
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------​

NekoC is a plugin that allows you and your players to become Anime Nekos!

Our Support [discord](https://discord.com/invite/euUyuZhgap) 

​
Please report any bugs to the Github Repository.

This plugin uses Bstats to collect anonymous data.

FEATURES
---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------​


    RP commands such as
        petting nekos
        scratching nekos behind the ear
        The ability for nekos to purr
        The abilities for nekos to lightly bite your hand to show affection
        And more!
    On Demand Nightvision for Nekos
    On Demand Jumpboost for Nekos
    On Demand Swift Sneak 3 for Nekos
    Claws for bonus unarmed damage
    Permission or flatfile based neko storage. Please note permission based storage requires LuckPerms. 
    An adorable chat filter that makes Nekos talk cat-like
    CATNIP!
    Nekos can only eat meat/sugar products. Vegetables and fruits not allowed. As a bonus Raw Fish gives the same hunger and saturation as cooked fish!
    All of these can be configured via config!
    Plugman compatable, you can reload the config on the fly!

COMMANDS
----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------​

    /pat (Username) : Pat a neko! (This also plays a purring sound.)
    /earscratch (Username) : Scratch a neko behind the ear! (This also plays a purring sound.)
    /attention (Username) : Try to get someones attention! (Nekos only)
    /purr (Username) : Purr on the feet of someone! (Nekos only)
    /lovebite (Username) : Lightly bite someones finger to show your love! (Nekos only)
    /hiss (Username) : Hiss at someone to show anger! (Nekos only, also plays a Hiss sound.)
    /scratch (Username) : Scratch someone to show anger! (Nekos only)
    /nightvision (on/off) : toggle your nightvision! (Nekos only)
    /jumpboost (on/off) : toggle your Jumpboost! (Neko's only)
    /swiftsneak : Toggle swift sneak 3 on and off! (Neko's only)
    /nekotf : Make yourself a neko or remove your neko status (Permission NekoC.nekotf)
    /nekotf (username) : Make someone a neko or remove their neko staus! (Permission NekoC.Admin, requires NekoC.nekotf aswell)


PERMISSIONS
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------​

    NekoC.nekotf : Access to the nekotf command
    NekoC.admin: Access to change others neko status

KNOWN BUGS
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------​

    None!

TO-DO/ADD
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------​

    Alterrnative storage methods (H2/MySQL)
    More options for Catnip creation and effects.

SERVERS RUNNING THIS PLUGIN
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------​

If you have a server you want to appear here, message me on spigotmc, or my discord at kurumitokisaki These spots are not purchased, nothing is asked for or required to get them besides giving me the server IP.



    play.parucraft.net, [1.21][Survival] (Contains P2W and gambling)


CREDITS
-----------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------​

chereverie - The picrew maker used for the plugin icon
